description_long: This object consists of two large, black plastic garbage bags, each tightly filled and tied at the top with a visible knot. The bags have a glossy, reflective surface that highlights their smooth, crinkled texture and the tension from the contents inside. The bags are irregularly shaped, bulging outward in several places, suggesting they are filled with mixed refuse or household waste. No printed labels, logos, or text are visible on the exterior, and the bags are completely opaque, concealing their contents. The bags are shown resting directly on the ground, with one slightly in front of and overlapping the other. The overall appearance is typical of garbage bags found on urban streets, sidewalks, or near residential buildings awaiting collection.
description: Two large, glossy black garbage bags, tightly filled and tied at the top, rest on the ground with a crinkled, bulging appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the two bags overlapping, with the left bag mostly behind the right and both tied at the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals both bags standing side by side, showing their rounded, bulging forms and glossy surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear angled view highlights the back of the left bag and the side of the right bag, emphasizing their fullness and surface creases.
description_view_3: Direct rear view displays both bags upright and adjacent, with their tied tops and smooth, shiny exteriors clearly visible.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: Both bags are tightly filled and bulging, with pronounced surface tension and rounded, swollen shapes.
